reviews.comment:
Atención muy rápida,  teniendo en cuenta que había fila de autos y era la vuelta del fin de semana largo.

(Translated by Google)
Very quick service, considering there was a line of cars and it was the return from the long weekend.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvZ0txSGp3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very clean and the food is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdjZUeGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
ACA,   Lincoln,    excelente la atención  en  todos sus sectores.   Yo usé  el  bar,  los surtidores,   los boxes   y  también me auxiliaron camino a Junín,  porque revente una cubierta,  fueron relativamente rápido y me cambiaron la cubierta  y  pude seguir viaje sin problema.  👍👍👍👍👍

(Translated by Google)
ACA, Lincoln, excellent service in all areas. I used the bar, the pumps, the service bays, and they even helped me on my way to Junín because I had a flat tire. They were relatively quick, changed the tire, and I was able to continue my trip without any problems. 👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3482801919201175816/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdzh6LUJREAE
